name: Spaghetti Aglio e Olio (Spaghetti with Garlic
recipeIngredient: 1 small Hot red pimento, fresh, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill a large saucepan with 7 pints (5L) of cold water and bring to a rolling boil over high heat.
2. Add 2 tablespoons salt and return to a rolling boil.
3. Add pasta and cook uncovered, stirring occasionally with a plastic or wooden fork. When cooked, remove from the water immediately. Do not rinse.
4. While the pasta is cooking, prepare the sauce. In a skillet, sauté the garlic in oil over medium heat until transparent; add the hot pimento and parsley. Reduce the heat to low and add the spaghetti, mixing gently. Season generously with black pepper and serve immediately. If desired, add grated Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese to taste.
